info.name: Handover SR — FIT_OUT_AND_HANDOVER / HANDOVER
info.description:
Handover SR workflow (FIT_OUT_AND_HANDOVER / HANDOVER).

**Auth:** Run **Auth → POST cenomi-ai/login** first (`x-internal-api-token` + email). The **Tests** script saves `data.access_token` into **`{{access_token}}`** for collection Bearer auth on all other requests.

**URLs:** **`{{auth_base_url}}`** — direct API for login (e.g. `http://localhost:8080/v1`). **`{{baseUrl}}`** — service-requests/files (e.g. same host or tenant proxy `http://localhost:4200/backend_api`). Align both if your token must match the API host.

exec: console.warn("Could not parse JSON or save token:", e.message);

request.description: Internal API key (UUID from DB/migration). Response `{ success, data: { access_token } }` — token is stored for Bearer auth on handover requests.

response.name: GET workflows (form skeleton)

request.description: `FetchServiceRequestByID` — use after Step 1 to refresh payload / `sr_operations`.

request.description: Duplicate this request and change `document_type_id` to: `SR_HANDOVER_SITE_SURVEY`, `SR_COP_CHECKLIST_OTHER`, `SR_HANDOVER_OTHER`. Body = raw PDF bytes. Save returned `document_id` into `{{doc_fm_uuid}}` (accumulate all FM doc IDs).
